prompt: I already have a Godot 4 project with a player character that moves in 8 directions. The player scene has CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D and CollisionShape2D. Now I need to add: (1) a slime enemy with chase AI, (2) a sword attack for the player, and (3) a combat system where both can take damage. What's the plan?

assertions.text: Recommends Area2D hitbox/hurtbox pattern (not body-to-body collision)
Recommends building and testing incrementally (enemy, then attack, then wiring)
Includes collision layer table with explicit bitmask values
Separates hurt stun duration from invincibility duration
Provides concrete numeric values (HP, damage, speed, durations)
Mentions delegating to subagents for MCP or script writing
Asks user to playtest after implementation
